home.reviewLipstick: The lipstick is amazing, I have almost all the colors, been using it for years, after this I can't use others, truly the best! Super long-lasting, super saturated and doesn't dry lips like some alternatives...
home.reviewPerfume: My favorite perfume, at first very unusual but then opens up beautifully, so cool)) many say it smells like soap, I love those kinds of scents...
home.reviewMascara: The mascara is wonderful. Applying with this brush is easy and pleasant) It holds on the lashes confidently, and comes off easily with micellar water...
home.reviewShampoo1: Great shampoo. Very satisfied. Buying it again, not for the first time.
home.reviewShampoo2: I didn't buy here, but I wanted to share a review. Really liked the shampoo and conditioner from the line. I have thick, long, colored hair. Fit perfectly and the scent is very pleasant and fresh...
home.reviewCream: The cream has a pleasant texture, decent scent, haven't seen results yet... delivery service was excellent, thank you for the speed, everything arrived super fast!...

about.title: Beauty Without Limits
about.welcome: Welcome to the exciting world of MAKEUP! Already over 340 million users from different countries visit here, and the products they purchase reach an annual mark of 50 million.
about.noLimits: We believe there should be no limits or barriers to beauty, so we provide access to an endless variety of cosmetic products and services for all beauty enthusiasts.
about.goal: Our goal is to give you the opportunity to find everything you desire in the world of beauty, and even more.
about.powerhouse: One of the most powerful online beauty retailers in Europe, MAKEUP is already successfully operating in 36 countries. Every day we continue to work for you, expanding MAKEUP's horizons and creating an amazing world of beauty.
about.wideRange: The widest range of beauty products
about.wideRangeDesc: Over 3,000 brands and 164,000 products — our team knows what is relevant today and which brands will create a buzz among true connoisseurs of cosmetics and perfumery.
about.partnershipDesc: MAKEUP is authorized and works under direct contracts with the largest luxe brands: YSL, Lancome, Biotherm, Armani, Prada, Valentino, Estee Lauder, Clinique... We are proud to collaborate with official suppliers and offer exclusively original products, unique collections and additional benefits from brands.
about.comfortDesc1: Have you noticed that often essential beauty products are located on the shopping map as inconveniently as possible? Your favorite shampoo — at the master's salon, mascara and eyeliner — in a separate chain of stores, cosmeceuticals — exclusively at the pharmacy. We believe it's time to put an end to exhausting marathons for restocking and lengthy searches for great deals!
about.comfortDesc2: MAKEUP has gathered all categories in its assortment, beauty products from the most remote corners of the planet and in different variations — from mass-market to luxury. A modern price control system, monitoring of current new products and ultra-convenient delivery will let you enjoy shopping, saving time for more important things. Over the years, MAKEUP has become synonymous with comfortable shopping, we don't stop and improve our service daily!
about.showroomsDesc1: TOP luxury brands, unique niche perfumes, organic cosmetics and professional products are presented in MAKEUP showrooms. Here you can get a consultation from specialists, undergo hi-tech diagnostics of your skin features, individually select care products and test what interests you.
about.showroomsDesc2: Two spacious showrooms operate in Kyiv (Atmosfera Shopping Center) and Warsaw (Wola Park). Online site prices apply for regular MAKEUP customers.
about.atelierDesc: For many years we have specialized in the beauty industry, working with leading brands and experts, which allowed us to combine top-class masters, effective beauty products, talent and technology in a single space — the MAKEUP beauty salon. Styling and hair care, therapeutic cosmetology and hi-tech procedures are available at MAKEUP Beauty Atelier in Warsaw.
about.atelierHours:
Mon-Sat, from 10:00 to 21:00.
Phone for appointments: +48 602 661 809
E-mail: salon.wolapark@makeup.pl
about.trendsDesc: MAKEUP knows your preferences, thoughts and dreams. Every year our customers receive over 1 million gifts. Samples, miniatures, tastings of rare fragrances, ongoing promotions, quests with valuable prizes and special offers — we always strive to discover something new for you and help you find your favorites!
about.futureDesc1: Our goal is to see beauty in all its unique manifestations, to highlight and create it in the world around us...
about.futureDesc2: We care about the future of the planet and constantly work on recycling and conscious consumption projects. We have abandoned the use of polyethylene for packaging shipments, replacing it with paper, which, like our branded boxes, is recyclable. In 2022 we implemented special equipment, allowing us to use eco-friendly tape in the packaging process.
about.futureDesc3: We support brands that care about the environment, and also provide customers with information about current sustainable innovations in packaging and ingredients. Vegan, Bio, PETA — with a special filter, our customers can easily find products that have the relevant certifications.
about.inspirationDesc1: Reviews, swatches, tests, secrets and expert tips... We have created a space that inspires.
about.inspirationDesc2: Over 2 million Facebook subscribers, more than 700 thousand Instagram followers, a TOP YouTube channel, online digest, beauty editorial blog, over 3 million product reviews on the site, a special Makeup Club community for sharing beauty tips and experiences — over the years we have built a unique information portal and gained a huge number of fans.
about.joinUs: Join MAKEUP and create beauty history with us!

shipping.title: We deliver happiness. For free.
shipping.subtitle: Enter the name of your city and we'll offer delivery options
shipping.courierDetails: Free courier delivery, minimum order amount — 99,000 soums. The order will be shipped from the EU. Delivery takes 8-11 business days.

beautyclub.title: Beauty Club
beautyclub.birthdayTitle: Get a gift on your birthday
beautyclub.birthdayDesc: MAKEUP Beauty Club has prepared a little secret of great mood. Choose a gift for your Birthday. Because it's so nice!
beautyclub.birthdayGet: any products from our site, with a total value of up to 60,000 soums or a corresponding discount on your order — completely free. The gift can be received with any order from 370,000 soums. Your gift will be combined with the current promotional offer and other applicable discounts.
beautyclub.birthdayNeed: enter your date of birth in your personal account, wait for a congratulatory email and choose a gift with your next order. You don't need to present documents when receiving the cherished box with your order — your registration data is enough for us!
beautyclub.trendDesc: When all your friends are fighting over pearlescent pink lipstick, you proudly choose a plum shade. You're always on the crest of the fashion wave and know all beauty world trends in advance. And we know your little secret, because with MAKEUP Beauty Club reviews and tips — staying trendy is easy!
beautyclub.trendGet: unique reviews of hot new products and trends, as well as opinions of our customers about the most popular products. Our tips, beauty articles and recommendations will help you not only follow fashion but follow it with incredible ease.
beautyclub.newYearDesc: We celebrate the New Year by our own rules! When placing an order under your account, we'll remember the date of your first order and will be sure to congratulate you on the anniversary.
beautyclub.newYearGet: one of the offered surprises from MAKEUP. These can be accessories or other beauty products.
beautyclub.newYearNeed: simply add products to your cart for 120,000 soums or more, and when placing an order under your login/password, the system will offer you several gifts to choose from. The surprise will be available within 2 weeks after the anniversary, don't forget to subscribe to our newsletters, we'll remind you about the gift waiting for you. You can use the offer once. Next year another surprise will be waiting for you, so stay with us and make this world even more beautiful!
beautyclub.brandsDesc: A new Chanel clutch, a year's supply of shampoo or a discount on the trendiest lipstick. The freshest deals and special brand gifts — for MAKEUP Beauty Club members. And let everyone around be envious, because you get the best. And how... a special secret of MAKEUP club.
beautyclub.brandsGet: all club members receive our special digest. Stay informed about new promotions and gifts from famous brands. Get our newsletter to your email and choose the most tempting offers!
beautyclub.brandsNeed: enter your email in your personal account, in the "Manage Subscriptions" section confirm the notifications you would like to receive, and don't forget to check your email. We'll tell you about all available promotions and gifts you can receive from MAKEUP.
beautyclub.brandsEmailNote: You can always change your email in your personal account.
beautyclub.wishlistDesc: The secret of your desires — a personal wishlist. A bold lipstick shade, a trending new product from Lancome or a new hair color — your secret plans are always at hand!
beautyclub.wishlistGet: the ability to collect in one list all the products you're waiting for or simply planning to try. By creating a wishlist, you can easily track product availability and their current price. Moreover, there's no longer a need to remember which product you liked last time, because all your favorites are at your fingertips!
beautyclub.wishlistNeed: log in to your personal account using your MAKEUP Beauty Club member data — login and password. Find the desired product on the site and use the "add to favorites" button to add it to your wishlist.
beautyclub.historyDesc: Do you remember the name of that beautiful nail polish shade you bought a few months ago? Or what number was the new foundation you dared to try and received so many enthusiastic compliments? The secret of your consistently perfect look is MakeUp Beauty Club, because with it you can always check your order history!
beautyclub.historyGet: we save an organized list of all your past orders. Now you have quick access to your favorite products and the ability to track their updates on the site.
beautyclub.historyNeed: shop online using your login credentials for your personal account. Purchase history will be saved automatically, but only if you are logged in on the site.
